reasoning: At 4x the sprite has clear charm and personality: round skull-like head with expressive face, blue sparkle wings flanking the sides, and a sturdy barrel/crate base — the 'active' energy is immediately legible and the composition reads as a magical toy. Contrast holds on both dark and light backgrounds; the blue sparkles pop well on dark, and the darker teal/brown barrel reads fine on the cream bg. Edge cleanliness is good at 4x — pixel art is tight. However at 1x the wing sparkles and face detail collapse into a fuzzy blob; only the gross silhouette (small figure with something sticking out sideways) survives. The skull-motif face skirts the 'friendly toy' boundary — not aggressively edgy, but not purely cute-round either. Silhouette shape is reasonably distinctive (round head + boxy torso + side sparks) but the 1x read is weaker than ideal. Passes the sticker test at 4x, marginal at 1x.
